title: Oatsurae Jirôkichi kôshi
actors: Denjirô Ôkôchi, Naoe Fushimi, Nobuko Fushimi
plot: The only completely preserved silent film directed by Daisuke Ito, this film relates the life of a legendary thief, Jirokichi the Rat in an exquisite original story and through the revolutionary use of dynamic intertitles. The ski...
